highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy:

faqs.question: How can I get into KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.Pharma Candidate must have completed graduation from a recognised university.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply
B.Pharma Candidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.

faqs.question: How is the infrastructure at KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy provide good facilities all around the campus such as Auditorium, Cafeteria, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy offers Degree and Diploma courses including 2 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Quality Assurance , Pharmaceutical.

faqs.question: Which courses does KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy offer to students?
faqs.answer: KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy has courses such as M.Pharma, D.Pharma, B.Pharma to offer. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences. KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Quality Assurance , Pharmaceutical.

A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy is up to 150. Good thing to know is that KYDSCT's College of Pharmacy has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE, PCI.

overview_faqs.answer: KMCT Dental College is a renowned institution offering MDS, BDS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. KMCT Dental College boasts an impressive review rating of 4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4 for Campus Life, 4 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: KMCT Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the best infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: A total of 100 students were there in my batch. There are no placements. A compulsory internship of 5 years with a 7000 per month salary is given. As we have NAAC A+ accreditation, we are more preferred over other colleges dentists. We are given research programs along with courses so that we can earn a good amount by last year.
content.Infrastructure: We have a digital evaluation center, a good canteen, Milma refreshing points, a hospital nearby, a mini theater, a digital library with Wi-Fi availability, a mini bank around campus, and an open gym. In the hostel, study hall, sick room, and washing machine facilities are available. A room for 3 students. Prayer hall is available. Food is good, no problem. Apart from these, the herbal garden, basketball, badminton court, cricket pitch, football ground, and tennis court are all available. The indoor sports complex is also present.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities of KMCT Dental College.

content.Placements: There are a total of 100 seats in this college. There are no placements here. They only offer a 1-year internship with a stipend of 7000 rs. per month after 4.5 years of the course. Every student has to do a compulsory internship in the college hospital itself after completing the course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is really awesome and well developed. There is free Wi-Fi connection, smart class, and a really good library facility. The hostel is really a top-notch one. 3 people per room with attached bathroom. 2 lifts provided. Clean and hygienic hostel. Food provided in mess is really nutritious and fulfilling.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for BDS.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities provided in our college are good. Students are well-equipped with the necessary skills for their careers and are encouraged to start their careers successfully. Our college provides career guidance, workshops, and an incubation center for the students to start as an entrepreneur or practice in any clinic.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and environment of our college are good with an advanced library facility, indoor games complex, well maintained mini theatres, open gym, badminton court, etc. Our campus is very calm and peaceful. Mess and canteen are average but there are many canteens and a coffee bar within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college with NAAC A+

content.Placements: This college have a good infrastructure and provide various types of opportunities to develop our experience in Dentistry . There are a lot of dental chairs and others required equipments provided. They provide monthly stipend of ₹6000, during internship. They do provide scholarship for students from economically backward caste. . This college have a great patient flow and we will definitely have a good patient exposure before finishing the course.
content.Infrastructure: They have the best library than any other colleges in Kerala. The infrastructure of the college is excellent in all aspects. We have got a NAAC A+ during the inspection. College hostel also have a great facilities along with good food and water. The quality of the food provided from the mess is also good.

highlights.summary: The GPAT 2026 application form for admission to the MPharma course is expected to be released during the first week of April 2026.

placements.overview: Founded in 2004, Radharaman College of Pharmacy is a private institute. It is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The institute is accredited with PCI. Radharaman College of Pharmacy provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 4 courses across specialisation such as Pharmaceutical. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.Pharma, M.Pharma and D.Pharma. Radharaman College of Pharmacy fees ranges between INR 46,000 to 96,000. The student intake for these courses is 181. Radharaman College of Pharmacy offers these course across fields such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Radharaman College of Pharmacy offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely a perfect college life experience.

review_content.Placements: The placements are very good in the college the training and placement cell offices takes the care of the students in getting their job placements they provide the students with required type of training which is essential for the students to get the highest package jobs max 89 percent of the students get place.
review_content.Infrastructure: College conducts so many events like fests, cultural events, festive events, sports events. , etc. It has a library full of books, and it also had a digital library in the college with access to many books it conducts many games like shot put, tennicoit, kabbaddi, cricket etc. There is an indoor stadium where the students can refresh themselves there are many clubs in the college for each department in data Science department there are 5 clubs: *dataminds learning workshop club *novaversity club *innovation and incubation club *service spectrum club *entertainment club.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: My experience at campus placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides average placements. It provides 1-10 offers. Companies like Wipro, Byju's, Tata, and Infosys. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Around 25% of students got placements. Students can plat to get a degree and get trained in a professional coding center for 2 years and start growing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Minimal books are provided in the library. We have a digital library. It has old books and old project submissions. The hostel registration is simple. We have to fill in other details in the college application by submitting it to the administration office. The meal quality is average and less affordability cost. The menu is less. There are no fast food and non-vegetarian items in the canteen. I rented a room outside in Guntur. There is a third-party hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I'm partially satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in college are not bad if students are curious to study. You need to submit your CV to get placements. Otherwise, any company won't be interested if students are not interested. Through Radharaman, students have a great opportunity to get placements at Bhopal. Different companies from Bhopal visit the college for conducting placement drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of food offered in the hostel is very good. Students can find accommodation in the hostels of depot square as they have a lot of hostel branches for both boys and girls. Although the hostels are far from the college, they have private bus facility all over Bhopal which is compulsory. So travelling to college is not a problem but a matter of time as you might miss the bus. There is no Wi-Fi facility provided on the campus. They have a huge library and different labs for different subjects. The labs and classrooms in the college are very clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good teacher in this college.

review_content.Placements: Many students placed in B pharmacy. The highest packages are offered. Top recruiting companies in these college are coming. Many job are offering in this college. This college is very good for other subjects like engineering, d pharmacy and also others . It is very good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is at high-speed internet, labs is very good lab and their instruments we have enjoying experiment in labs. Classroom is very good. It is modern type class room, also library are good it has many books for what we need then find out solution in book.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides you good value for money. The overall education system is above the average.

review_content.Placements: Placement are based on the talent. About 30% to 40% of the students got placed in different industries. Replacement value of start from the lower limit of 1.5 Lacs to higher limit of 8.6 Lacs, the average salary was between 3 to 4 Lacs. The roles were given according to their talent and knowledge in their respective field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Data structure of the college is not quite good but overall the educational requirement is to be fulfilled in every extent. The canteen provided by the college is not quite well, also the food given to us is limited and do not provide such a good value of money. Hostel is very appropriate and supporting staff are too good also they care for us, every basic requirement is fulfilled which is really necessary. Yes we have faced a little bit of problems related to infrastructure in the college but it literally it does't matter if your education system is good that's it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty members are too supportive.

review_content.Placements: Don't know about placements because I am a diploma student. But I heard placement is offered in best pharmacy companies and they also give internship training in the best companies. The students get the highest package jobs, maximum 89% of the students get placed. The placements are very good at the college. The training and placement cell offices take care of the students in getting their job placements. They provide the students with the required type of training which is essential for the students to get the highest package jobs. Maximum 89% of the students get placed.

reviews_list.review_title: Good teachers and a good Ayurveda practice.

review_content.Placements: The internees here do not get paid. Rather, they have to pay to do the internship. It is acceptable as it is a private college. The hospital patient inflow is also less. Everyone in this college gets the internship, and the rest is assured well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-ventilated and have air conditioning. Every department has a good Wi-Fi connection with high connectivity. The mess food is quite acceptable, and the workers here are very well. Sports and games time is given in the evening, and there are 2 small badminton courts and 1 volleyball court.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurveda, Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: My batch started in 2022 in my 1 year. Around 90% of students pass the first-year exam, so this is the best course. We can work as doctors, and we can run our own hospitals or work as duty doctors. All students who pass will get a chance to do internships in our college hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a Wi-Fi campus. The college hostel has good facilities like hygienic food. Snacks are also provided in the college hostel. The college has good quality infrastructure. Evening time, they will allow us to play games on campus then they will provide food. The college has 4 libraries on the campus itself with AC. The library is open till 9 at night, so students can use the library all the time. The library also provides books for students, and they can calmly study for their exams in the library. Classrooms also have AC facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurveda, Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The good place to study and score good in exams.

review_content.Placements: The internees here are first made to pay the fee and then made to attend the internship programme. The internship programme here does not pay rather, they only make us pay and then give the internship. The hospital is very well-maintained good, but the patient inflow is very less.
review_content.Infrastructure: Departments here are very well-connected and air-conditioned for the students. They have very good connectivity. Classrooms have very well benches and are air-conditioned. The hostel food is not so bad, and the food taste is quite acceptable, but some people don't actually like it.

review_summary.college_name: KVG Ayurveda Medical College And Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurveda, Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studies but campus experience is average.

content.Placements: Students here are quite dissatisfied with the internship program. The internees here are not paid, rather they only have to pay for doing an internship here. The students who got out from here are on their own in perceiving the upcoming job. The patient inflow is less and the patient exposure is low.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is quite well. All the departments here are equipped with Wi-Fi and ceiling fans. It has one indoor auditorium and one seminar hall. The classrooms here are well-equipped with projector speakers and air conditioning. The library here has a vast number of books. Overall the infrastructure is decent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurveda, Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The place to study well and get a good job.

content.Placements: Almost everyone gets placed in a job. Internees have to pay on their own first to get the internship, and they made to pay at first and does not get paid for it. The college hospital is good, but the patient inflow in the hospital is quite low and it is acceptable.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-ventilated with air conditioning, and departments here have a well Wi-Fi connection with better connectivity. The infrastructure is very good and feels new. The mess is good, with acceptable food. Sports are played in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurveda, Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good teachers and a good Ayurveda practice.

content.Placements: The internees here do not get paid. Rather, they have to pay to do the internship. It is acceptable as it is a private college. The hospital patient inflow is also less. Everyone in this college gets the internship, and the rest is assured well.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-ventilated and have air conditioning. Every department has a good Wi-Fi connection with high connectivity. The mess food is quite acceptable, and the workers here are very well. Sports and games time is given in the evening, and there are 2 small badminton courts and 1 volleyball court.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurveda, Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: My batch started in 2022 in my 1 year. Around 90% of students pass the first-year exam, so this is the best course. We can work as doctors, and we can run our own hospitals or work as duty doctors. All students who pass will get a chance to do internships in our college hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a Wi-Fi campus. The college hostel has good facilities like hygienic food. Snacks are also provided in the college hostel. The college has good quality infrastructure. Evening time, they will allow us to play games on campus then they will provide food. The college has 4 libraries on the campus itself with AC. The library is open till 9 at night, so students can use the library all the time. The library also provides books for students, and they can calmly study for their exams in the library. Classrooms also have AC facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurveda, Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The good place to study and score good in exams.

content.Placements: The internees here are first made to pay the fee and then made to attend the internship programme. The internship programme here does not pay rather, they only make us pay and then give the internship. The hospital is very well-maintained good, but the patient inflow is very less.
content.Infrastructure: Departments here are very well-connected and air-conditioned for the students. They have very good connectivity. Classrooms have very well benches and are air-conditioned. The hostel food is not so bad, and the food taste is quite acceptable, but some people don't actually like it.
